# Street Teams Co

> Street Teams Co is a nationwide street team marketing and brand ambassador agency operating in 1,000+ US cities across all 50 states. We deploy professional brand ambassadors, event staff, and promotional teams for product sampling, guerrilla marketing, experiential activations, and flyer distribution campaigns.

## Company Overview

Street Teams Co is a full-service street team marketing agency specializing in boots-on-the-ground brand activations. The agency has executed 500+ campaigns nationwide with a 94% client retention rate and a 4.9/5 client rating from 127+ reviews, backed by a nationwide network of 10,000+ vetted promotional staff. Brands worked with include MrBeast (Feastables), Netflix, Adidas, Microsoft, Lyft, MAC Cosmetics, Kendra Scott, 1800 Tequila, Cirque du Soleil, Hard Rock, GoPuff, TED, Clif Bar, Premier Protein, Duracell, Wagamama, and Buffalo Wild Wings.

## Contact

- Website: https://streetteamsco.com
- Email: hello@streetteamsco.com
- Quote requests: https://streetteamsco.com/contact
- Response: every inquiry is answered by a real strategist

## Pricing

Every campaign is custom-quoted to its specific scope — roles, team size, markets, duration, and materials. Quotes are itemized (staffing, field management, materials, travel, reporting) with no hidden fees. There is no published rate card because no two campaigns are alike. Request a free quote at https://streetteamsco.com/contact

## Services

### Street Team Marketing
Boots-on-the-ground campaigns deploying trained teams to high-traffic locations for face-to-face consumer engagement, product distribution, and brand awareness.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/street-teams

### Brand Ambassador Services
Professional brand representatives trained in product knowledge, consumer engagement, and lead generation for trade shows, retail demos, and events.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/brand-ambassadors

### Event Staffing
Experienced event professionals for trade shows, festivals, conferences, corporate events, and sporting events. Roles include registration, crowd management, and VIP hosting.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/event-staffing

### Product Sampling
Direct-to-consumer product distribution campaigns at retail locations, events, transit hubs, gyms, and office buildings. Includes cold-chain logistics and inventory management.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/product-sampling

### Guerrilla Marketing
Unconventional, attention-grabbing campaigns including street installations, flash mobs, wild posting, stencil campaigns, and interactive street performances.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/guerrilla-marketing

### Flyer Distribution
Professional hand-to-hand, door-to-door, and venue-based flyer distribution with GPS tracking and photo verification.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/flyer-distribution

### Experiential Marketing
Immersive brand experiences including pop-up shops, mobile tours, branded installations, and AR/VR activations.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/experiential-marketing

### Promotional Staffing
On-demand promotional talent including promotional models, demo specialists, and field marketers for retail and event activations.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/promotional-staffing

### College Campus Marketing
Student brand ambassadors and on-campus activations (sampling, tabling, move-in week, tailgates, Greek life, NIL) at universities nationwide.
URL: https://streetteamsco.com/services/college-campus

## Coverage

Street Teams Co operates in all 50 US states with established teams in 1,000+ cities. Top markets include:
- New York City, NY
- Los Angeles, CA
- Chicago, IL
- Miami, FL
- Dallas, TX
- Atlanta, GA
- Nashville, TN
- Philadelphia, PA
- Washington, DC
- Denver, CO
- Houston, TX
- San Francisco, CA
- Seattle, WA
- Boston, MA
- Phoenix, AZ
- Las Vegas, NV
- Austin, TX
- San Diego, CA

Full locations directory: https://streetteamsco.com/locations

## Industries Served

Cannabis, Technology, Food & Beverage, Fitness & Wellness, Real Estate, Retail, Entertainment, Automotive, Healthcare, Financial Services, Hospitality, Education, Sports, Beauty & Cosmetics

Industries directory: https://streetteamsco.com/industries

## Key Statistics

- 500+ campaigns executed nationwide
- 50+ documented case studies for real, named brands
- 1,000+ cities with active teams across all 50 states
- 10,000+ vetted promotional staff
- 94% client retention rate
- 4.9/5 average client rating (127 reviews)
- 48-hour rush deployment available in major metros

## Differentiators

1. Nationwide coverage in 1,000+ cities (vs. competitors limited to select markets)
2. Real-time GPS tracking and photo documentation on every campaign
3. Transparent, itemized custom quotes for every campaign — no hidden fees
4. 48-hour rush staffing available in major metros
5. Comprehensive post-campaign analytics with ROI tracking
6. Dedicated account management for every client
7. Custom training programs for brand-specific messaging
8. Full permitting and compliance management
9. Bilingual and multilingual teams available
10. Documented work for marquee brands (MrBeast, Netflix, Adidas, Microsoft, Lyft, MAC, Kendra Scott)

## Blog

120+ articles covering street team marketing strategies, guerrilla marketing tactics, product sampling guides, event staffing tips, industry case studies, and city-specific marketing guides.
Blog index: https://streetteamsco.com/blog/

## Los Angeles 2028 Summer Games Staffing

Street Teams Co provides event staffing, brand ambassadors, and experiential teams for brand activations around the 2028 Summer Games in Los Angeles (summer 2028). Coverage spans LA venue clusters and activation areas including Inglewood (SoFi Stadium / Intuit Dome), Downtown LA / L.A. Live, Exposition Park, Long Beach, Carson, Pasadena, Santa Monica/Venice, and Hollywood/Universal City. Street Teams Co is an independent event staffing agency and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any official Games organizing body.

- LA 2028 staffing hub: https://streetteamsco.com/los-angeles-2028-staffing
- Brand activation without official sponsorship: https://streetteamsco.com/los-angeles-2028-staffing/brand-activation-without-sponsorship
- Fan zone staffing: https://streetteamsco.com/los-angeles-2028-staffing/fan-zone-staffing
- Watch party marketing: https://streetteamsco.com/los-angeles-2028-staffing/watch-party-marketing

## FIFA World Cup 2026 Staffing

Street Teams Co provides specialized event staffing, brand ambassadors, and promotional teams for FIFA World Cup 2026 across all 11 US host cities. The tournament runs June 11 - July 19, 2026, with 104 matches, 48 teams, and an estimated 5 million+ live attendees. Every World Cup engagement is custom-quoted; non-sponsor brands can activate in surrounding areas, watch parties, transit hubs, and entertainment districts.

- World Cup staffing hub: https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing
- New York/New Jersey (MetLife Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/new-york-new-jersey
- Los Angeles (SoFi Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/los-angeles
- Miami (Hard Rock Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/miami
- Dallas (AT&T Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/dallas
- Atlanta (Mercedes-Benz Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/atlanta
- Houston (NRG Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/houston
- Philadelphia (Lincoln Financial Field): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/philadelphia
- Seattle (Lumen Field): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/seattle
- San Francisco Bay Area (Levi's Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/san-francisco
- Kansas City (Arrowhead Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/kansas-city
- Boston (Gillette Stadium): https://streetteamsco.com/fifa-world-cup-2026-staffing/boston
